---
title: "Engineering 1100 - Engineering Design I"
---

Thank you for entering this post, I will be uploading the necessary course slides from my notes within this page/post from **Engineering 1100 - Engineering Design I**. Feel free to download and use these documents as a guide to improve and assist in your understanding of the Engineering Discipline.

Add the necessary pdf document [Lecture slides](tevheath/assets/fall2023/ENG_1100___Engineering_Design.pdf)
